sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, bitmap_col AggregateFunction(bitmapBuild, UInt32));
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, bitmapBuild([1, 2, 3])), (2, bitmapBuild([3, 4, 5]));
SELECT bitmapAndnotCardinality(bitmap_col, bitmapBuild([3, 4, 5])) AS result FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_table SET bitmap_col = bitmapBuild([2, 3, 4]) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT bitmapAndnotCardinality(bitmapBuild([1, 2]), bitmap_col) AS result FROM test_table WHERE id = 2;
